 {"id":"br-2gs4e","title":"BLOCKED: frankensqlite bd-3bql (5E.5 MVCC GC) in progress breaking compilation","description":"The mcp-agent-mail-rust workspace cannot compile because frankensqlite has partially applied changes for bd-3bql (5E.5 MVCC garbage collection). Errors include missing methods arena_write() and chain_heads_write() on VersionStore. Compilation will resume when bd-3bql is completed in /dp/frankensqlite.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:07:20.807525931Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-12T15:14:03.913693249Z","closed_at":"2026-02-12T15:14:03.913673832Z","close_reason":"Resolved: frankensqlite bd-3bql (5E.5 MVCC GC) changes are now complete enough for compilation to succeed. Verified with cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"br-2h8pz","title":"T5.3: Unit tests for tree widget adapter and thread hierarchy construction","description":"Comprehensive tests for ThreadTreeItem construction from flat message lists.

TEST CASES:

Tree construction:
- Single root message (no replies) produces single-node tree
- Two messages where second replies to first produces parent-child tree
- Three-level nesting (reply to reply to root) produces correct depth
- Multiple root messages (no reply_to_id) sorted chronologically
- reply_to_id references non-existent message -> treated as root (graceful)
- Circular reply_to_id references detected and cycle broken
- Empty message list produces empty tree
- 100+ messages with complex reply chains builds in < 10ms

TreeItem rendering:
- Selected item shows SELECTION_PREFIX
- Unread messages render bold
- Ack-required messages show badge
- Relative time formatting (seconds, minutes, hours, days)
- Long subject truncated to fit available width
- Agent name color-coded consistently

LOGGING:
Tests log the input message list (IDs + reply_to_ids) and the resulting tree structure
(indentation + IDs) for easy visual verification.

Target: 12+ tests.

FILES: tui_widgets.rs or tui_screens/threads.rs test module","acceptance_criteria":"Acceptance criteria:
- [ ] 5+ tree construction tests including edge cases
- [ ] 3+ rendering tests for styles and badges
- [ ] Circular reference detection test
- [ ] Performance test: 100+ messages in < 10ms
- [ ] All tests log input/output structure

Plan-space hardening additions:
- [ ] Comprehensive unit tests cover happy-path behavior, edge cases, invariants, and failure modes for this bead scope
- [ ] Integration/E2E (or PTY/stress where applicable) scripts validate end-user flows, degraded-mode behavior, and recovery paths for this bead
- [ ] Detailed diagnostics artifacts are produced (scenario IDs, timing breakdowns, failure reason codes, artifact paths, and repro commands)","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T19:59:54.596028994Z","updated_at":"2026-02-15T09:59:35.478143446Z","closed_at":"2026-02-15T09:59:35.478077833Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["testing","threads","tree-widget","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"br-2h8pz","depends_on_id":"br-3ok6s","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T23:56:07Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"br-2h8pz","depends_on_id":"br-gtdw2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-11T23:56:07Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"br-2he","title":"Share: viewer assets + export data + scaffolding","description":"## Objective
Implement share pipeline Steps 10–12: copy viewer assets, export viewer bootstrap data, and write bundle scaffolding.

## Scope
- Copy `viewer_assets` into bundle output.
- Export `messages.json` + `meta.json` for viewer bootstrap (limit default 500).
- Write scaffolding files: `manifest.json`, README, `_headers`, `HOW_TO_DEPLOY`, `.nojekyll`, `index.html`.

## Tests
- Integration tests verifying asset presence and bootstrap JSON schema.
- Snapshot tests for scaffolding files.

## Logging/Artifacts
- Store scaffolding outputs under `tests/artifacts/share/scaffolding/<timestamp>/`.

## Acceptance Criteria
1. Viewer assets are copied with correct file list and content.
2. Exported JSON matches legacy schema and limits.
3. Bundle scaffolding files are created and deterministic.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-05T16:16:23.424466902Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T17:54:16.508557943Z","closed_at":"2026-02-05T17:54:16.508539979Z","close_reason":"Viewer assets/export/scaffolding already implemented in bundle.rs with tests; viewer_* tests pass (manifest_* blocked by current core config compile errors)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"br-2he","depends_on_id":"br-1uf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-11T23:56:07Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"br-2hp7l","title":"Fix remaining clippy warnings across workspace (~150+ warnings)","description":"During CI check, found ~150+ clippy warnings primarily in:

- tui_widgets.rs: redundant clones, redundant closures
- lib.rs test code: significant_drop_tightening warnings, cast_possible_wrap

Started fixing in this session:
- Fixed doc_markdown warning in search_service.rs (init_bridge backticks)
- Fixed cast_sign_loss in query_integration.rs (use try_from instead of as u64)

Remaining work: Fix or suppress the ~150+ remaining warnings to pass 'cargo clippy -- -D warnings'","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-12T20:22:56.766665648Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T06:16:32.927006347Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T06:16:32.926985869Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":463,"issue_id":"br-2hp7l","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Session progress: Fixed 3 clippy warnings. Test code has 150+ warnings mostly significant_drop_tightening.","created_at":"2026-02-12T21:10:29Z"},{"id":465,"issue_id":"br-2hp7l","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"OpusSail: Fixed 9 format! string warnings in tui_app.rs perf tests.  {"id":"br-2hqj5","title":"Fix send_message failure: no such column rowid in fts_messages","description":"Repro: /data/tmp/cargo-target/release/am mail send --project /data/projects/mcp_agent_mail_rust --from RubyMountain ... fails with SQLite error: internal error: no such column: rowid in table fts_messages. This blocks agent coordination and likely causes MCP tool call timeouts. Investigate schema/triggers/query paths around fts_messages and align with current SQLite virtual table semantics, then verify send_message/fetch_inbox/ack flow works.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"RubyMountain","created_at":"2026-02-12T20:18:12.928357296Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-12T20:29:40.147564848Z","closed_at":"2026-02-12T20:29:40.147546273Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":469,"issue_id":"br-2hqj5","author":"RubyMountain","text":"Claimed and starting now. Reproduced via am mail send; failure is SQLite internal error: no such column rowid in fts_messages. I am tracing DB schema + FTS triggers + message insert path, then validating send/fetch/ack roundtrip.","created_at":"2026-02-12T20:18:37Z"},{"id":470,"issue_id":"br-2hqj5","author":"RubyMountain","text":"Root-cause analysis complete: message inserts fail under current runtime when message->FTS triggers are present. Existing DB had both legacy Python triggers (fts_messages_ai/ad/au with rowid writes) and Rust triggers (messages_ai/ad/au). Repro sequence observed: legacy triggers raised rowid error; after dropping them, Rust triggers still failed with OpenWrite/root page error. Implemented code fix in schema base migrations: add base-only cleanup migrations that always drop BOTH legacy and Rust message->FTS triggers in base mode, with regression tests proving inclusion and trigger removal.","created_at":"2026-02-12T20:28:13Z"},{"id":471,"issue_id":"br-2hqj5","author":"RubyMountain","text":"Verification: (1) cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-db base_migrations_ -- --nocapture passes, including new tests for base-trigger cleanup inclusion + actual trigger removal. (2) After applying equivalent trigger drops to live DB, am mail send to peer agents succeeds again (message ids 14 and 16). (3) workspace-wide cargo check/clippy currently fail on pre-existing search_service.rs compile/lint issues unrelated to this migration patch.","created_at":"2026-02-12T20:29:37Z"}]}
 {"id":"br-2hyu","title":"Use commit_paths_with_retry in CommitQueue fallback paths","description":"CommitQueue enqueue/process_batch currently calls commit_paths() directly in several paths. Under concurrent archive writers this can bubble git index.lock errors instead of using existing retry+lockfree fallback logic. Update those call sites to use commit_paths_with_retry() for consistent contention handling.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-09T12:59:27.112822686Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T13:07:06.106858973Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T13:07:06.106839797Z","close_reason":"Completed: CommitQueue fallback paths now use commit_paths_with_retry; validated with fmt/check/clippy (MSRV lint noted) and commit_queue tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
